rationale: In the citing paper, Deng et al. (2016) appears mainly as a prior example of lab-based eye-tracking work and is briefly noted in a future-research sentence about left-to-right shelf search. The citation is not used to build the paper's core hypotheses, identification strategy, or model for lateral and vertical attention biases in the field. There is no clear evidence that the citing study directly extends, refines, applies, or challenges Deng et al.'s framework in a central way.
